seeking.title: College Life & Memories
seeking.subtitle: College Life
seeking.description: "The road ahead is long and has no ending, yet I will seek with my will unbending." This records the continuous exploration and pursuit in academics, technology, and personal growth during the four years of university. Every night spent under the lamp and every bottleneck broken through are the most shining footprints on the road of seeking.

life.title: earthly Life & Memories
life.subtitle: earthly Life & Memories
life.description: "The worldly atmosphere of life is what heals the hearts of ordinary people." This carries the warmest bits of life, sincere friendship, and laughter of youth in the past four years. The street corners walked, the scenery seen, and the food shared weave together this irreplaceable and precious time.
